Home.title: Train smarter. Progress every day.
Home.description: Personalized routines, real progress, powered by AI.
Home.sessionHint: Log in to prepare your onboarding and personalized routine.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Access your routine, progress, and saved preferences.
login.googleError: Could not log in with Google.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Start your Apex Fit journey with personalized AI routines.
register.success: Account created. Check your email to confirm registration.
register.googleError: Could not sign up with Google.

Onboarding.title: Let's build your routine
Onboarding.description: Complete six quick steps so the app can prepare a routine around your body, goals, and equipment.
Onboarding.draftLoaded: Your draft is saved locally as you progress.
Onboarding.validationError: Complete the required fields before continuing.
Onboarding.submitError: Could not complete onboarding. Try again.

completed.title: Onboarding complete
completed.description: We already have the information needed to prepare your routine.

generationFailed.title: Your profile is ready
generationFailed.description: We saved your onboarding, but could not generate the routine right now. The dashboard will show the pending state while we retry later.

placeholders.personal: The name, gender, age, weight, height, and units form will go here.
placeholders.activity: The activity level selection will go here.
placeholders.goals: The multi-select goals and specific goal field will go here.
placeholders.health: The injuries or discomfort list will go here.
placeholders.equipment: The gym, home, or calisthenics selection will go here.
placeholders.routine: The routine type selection will go here.

goals.specificGoalPlaceholder: Example: I want to build glutes and shoulders

health.hint: Add discomfort or injuries. You can leave this empty.

routine.warning: With your current equipment, a 5-day routine may be hard to complete.

Dashboard.title: Apex home
Dashboard.description: Your active routine, progress, and next workout in one place.

states.error: We could not check your onboarding. Try refreshing the page.

onboardingRequired.title: Complete your profile before continuing
onboardingRequired.description: We need your body data, goals, and available equipment to prepare your personalized routine.

routinePending.title: Your profile is ready, but there is no active routine yet
routinePending.description: The routine is generated automatically after onboarding. If it does not appear, AI generation likely failed or is still pending; your profile data is already saved.

activeRoutine.title: Monthly plan
activeRoutine.description: Your personalized routine is saved. Review the week, pick a day, and prepare your next workout.

selectedDay.title: Exercises
selectedDay.restDay: Rest day. Focus on recovery, light mobility, and sleep.
selectedDay.empty: Select a training day to see its exercises.

routineStates.error: We could not load your routine. Try refreshing the page.
routineStates.offlineFallback: You are viewing the latest routine saved on this device.

Routine.title: Active routine
Routine.description: Review your full monthly plan, week by week.
Routine.nextRoutineReady: 🎯 Your new routine for {month} is ready!

states.error: We could not load your routine. Try refreshing the page.
states.empty: No active routine yet. Apex Fit will generate it automatically after onboarding.
states.offlineFallback: You are viewing the latest routine saved on this device.

RoutineDay.title: Day details
RoutineDay.description: Review exercises, sets, reps, suggested weights, and instructions.

tracker.title: Log progress
tracker.description: Mark what you completed today. It saves on this device first and syncs when online.
tracker.dayNotePlaceholder: Example: Felt strong, reduced intensity due to shoulder discomfort...
tracker.savedLocal: Saved locally. It will sync when connection is available.

states.error: We could not load this day. Try refreshing the page.
states.notFound: We could not find this day in your active routine.

Progress.title: Progress
Progress.description: Track streaks, completed days, and training statistics.
Progress.emptyLogs: No workouts logged yet. Complete a routine day to start tracking progress.

states.error: We could not load your progress. Try refreshing the page.
states.offlineFallback: You are viewing progress saved on this device.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: Manage your personal data, language, units, and training preferences.

personal.title: Your base information
personal.description: These details power recommendations and are stored internally in metric format.

fitness.title: Training preferences
fitness.description: Update goals, equipment, and limitations so your profile stays ready for future routines.

routine.activeTitle: You have an active routine this month
routine.activeDescription: Profile changes do not delete your current routine. Future monthly generations will use your updated data.
routine.outdatedTitle: Your active routine is not for the current month
routine.outdatedDescription: The app keeps your latest active routine while the monthly cycle prepares a new one automatically.
routine.emptyDescription: If onboarding is complete, automatic generation may have failed or stayed pending. There is no manual button on the dashboard.

settings.title: Local preferences
settings.description: Language, units, and offline state. For now they rely on profile data and local cache.
settings.saveHint: Language and unit changes are saved with the personal data button.

states.loadError: We could not load your profile. Try refreshing the page.
states.saveError: We could not save your changes.
